name: Part-DB
short_desc: An open-source inventory management system for electronic components.
author: Jan Bohmer
description: Part-DB is an open-source inventory management system for electronic components. It supports multi-language, barcode/label generation, user permissions, SSO, import/export, project management, event log, and more. It can be used on PC, tablet, and smartphone and supports MySQL, SQLite, and PostgreSQL databases.
